name: STANDARDS-URLS: entry may include archive_url (Wayback) used as fallback when authoritative URL 404s
setup:
printf 'src-1:
  publisher: A
  url: https://a.com
  archive_url: https://web.archive.org/web/2026/https://a.com
  license: CC-BY-4.0
  last_verified: 2026-05-04
' > STANDARDS-URLS.yaml
